```{r}
#| label: part-tbl-employment-academic
#| results: asis
employment_academic <- tribble(
  ~Period, ~Position, ~Institution,
  "2024 - Present", "Professor of Finance & Financial Technology", "Ulster University Business School",
  "Sep 2025 - Present", "Director, Centre for Finance and Responsible Technology", "Ulster University Business School",
  "2020 - 2024", "Senior Lecturer in Finance, Technology and Data Science", "Queen's Management School",
  "2010 - 2020", "Lecturer", "Department of Finance, Queen's Management School",
  "1998 - 2004", "Currency Trader and Liquidity Manager", "Janus Henderson Investors, London"
)

if (knitr::is_latex_output()) {
  cat("\\Needspace{12\\baselineskip}\n")
  employment_academic %>%
    knitr::kable(
      col.names = c("Period", "Position", "Institution"),
      align = c("l", "l", "l"),
      format = "latex",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      escape = TRUE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      font_size = 9,
      latex_options = "hold_position"
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(1, width = "2.4cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(2, width = "6.2cm") %>%
    kableExtra::column_spec(3, width = "4.8cm")
} else {
  employment_academic %>%
    mutate(
      Period = paste0("**", Period, "**")
    ) %>%
    knitr::kable(
      col.names = c("Period", "Position", "Institution"),
      format = "pipe",
      escape = FALSE
    ) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(
      bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"),
      full_width = FALSE,
      position = "left"
    )
}
```
